craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post *This is a Weekly Price, Plus Tax Apartment Style Living with No Lease! Introducing the best value extended-stay accommodations in the area! With our all-inclusive pricing, you can pay weekly or monthly and save hundreds of dollars every month. We don't require a lease, deposit, or credit check, making it easy to move in and out whenever it suits your schedule. Free Amenities: Secure property with key-controlled access Dog friendly - We love your fur babies! Under-bed storage for extra space and organizatio Free Utilities - Electric, A/C & Heat 24/7 on-site laundry faciliites Free Wi-Fi & Cable Full Kitchens - Save $money$ by cooking your own meals Fully furnished, check-in ready studios Free Bi-weekly Housekeeping - Relax and enjoy your time! No Deposit - Check-in any time No Lease - Check out on your schedule Flexible Payment Plans - Pay weekly or monthly On-Site Laundry: Available 24/7 for your convenience. Fully Equipped Kitchens: Each room features dual stove-top burners, microwaves, full-size sinks, and refrigerators, allowing you to save even more on meals! Safety and Security: Our staff is on-site around the clock, and the property is key-controlled 24/7 for your peace of mind. Pet-Friendly: We welcome up to two dogs under 50 lbs. (pet fee applies). Book Your Stay Today! Experience the best value in extended-stay accommodations! Contact Us Now! Call or email to reserve your spot! Limited-Time Offer for New Guests Only! Call: show contact info Pricing and availability are subject to change daily. Photos may not be of the exact advertised unit. Contact us today for the most up to date information. Extra charge for additional beds.
